properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v8

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Take what I've been given, make it multiply. Take the life I'm living make it touch the sky.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: You can take us higher Than we've ever been Lord you will inspire Lord you always win.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Even greater things than have been done before, take what we have done and make it more,

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: even greater things than have been done before, even greater things through Christ the Lord!

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Giant was so mighty, over nine feet tall. DavId looked so tiny, seemed so very small.

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: But your hand was with him, And the stone he slung, You gave him the vision, and through You he won.

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: It was just a pebble made Goliath fall, I must be more faithful, I must give my all

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: I've seen what you can do With a stone and sling! Take this life I give you; Take my ev'rything.
